message:
fix(ci): add missing beads_rust sibling clone to dist workflow

The Cargo.toml has `beads_rust = { path = "../beads_rust" }` but CI
never cloned it.  Previously masked by the actions/checkout@v4 path
failure.  Bump to v0.2.23.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
 
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
@@ -44,6 +45,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
 
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
@@ -84,6 +86,7 @@ jobs:
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust ../beads_rust
 
       - name: Install Rust nightly
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
